footer.tagline: Duteza imbere urubyiruko rw'ejo muri Rwanda binyuze mu burezi bwa digitale bufatika.
footer.rights: Sisitemu ya Smart school. Uburenganzira bwose burarinzwe.

legal.privacySubtitle: Uko Smart School ifata amakuru bwite (incamake ya demo).
legal.termsSubtitle: Amategeko yo gukoresha Smart School (inyandiko ya demo).

community.title: Injira mu muryango wacu
community.subtitle: Waba uri umwarimu, umunyeshuri, cyangwa ushaka intambwe ikurikira, dufite umwanya wawe.
community.staffDesc: Injira ku kibaho cyawe ucunge amasomo, igenzura ry'ubwitabire, kandi ushyigikire intsinzi y'abanyeshuri.
community.studentDesc: Tangira urugendo rwo kwiga, ubone ibikoresho by'amasomo, kandi ukurikirane amanota yawe mu gihe nyacyo.
community.parentDesc: Ababyeyi babona amanota, ubwitabire, imikoro, ibisubizo n'itumanaho bifasha imyigire.
community.afterClassDesc: Komeza gukura nyuma y'ishuri. Shakisha amasomo yisumbuye cyangwa amahirwe y'umwuga.
